'''Olmahk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] warrior. After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Bolpuhr]], he and [[Basbakhan]] were assigned to be the bodyguards of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. He was killed by [[Warrior caste|Yuuzhan Vong warriors]] during the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]].
